systems.system_notes: Femoral intramedullary nailing platform for antegrade and retrograde femoral fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials expose operative technique resources and implant information for the Expert Femoral Nail platform.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the femoral nail platform for shaft and selected proximal/distal femur fracture fixation.
The EFN construct includes proximal and distal locking fixation options.
The EFN platform includes end-cap compatibility within the femoral nail construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public EFN pages expose implant family and technique resources but this pass does not expand the full implant code table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or operative-technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
